brief_justification: Correct answer (No) with brief justification about luck vs intention; Surface-level reasoning — states the conclusion with one supporting reason but no deeper analysis of intentionality frameworks; No self-monitoring of reasoning process; No verification or counterfactual checks; No acknowledgment of uncertainty or competing intuitions; No alternative viewpoints considered (e.g., some might argue intent was present since he aimed); Minimal derivation — gives the answer and one reason but no structured reasoning chain
